notes: [New] Phone bridge rewrite — cleaner architecture, adding custom phone support is now much easier
[New] lb-tablet can now run simultaneously with any phone (lb-phone, gksphone, yseries, 17mov_phone)
[New] Social sharing split into two independent toggles: SocialPost + SocialMessage
[New] Phone config documentation added inline in config.lua
[Fix] Fast tab switching no longer causes empty screens (NUI callback timeout issue resolved)
[Fix] Login streak date check crash fixed
[Fix] App startup no longer triggers unnecessary server calls
[Fix] Login streak flow and notification system stabilized
[Fix] SharePopup adapted for all phone types
